result:
Implemented first-class task due dates in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go). Markdown tasks now parse a trailing `due: YYYY-MM-DD` marker, preserve that markup when toggled, and expose due metadata through the shared task model. CLI task listing supports `tasks upcoming` and `tasks overdue`, annotates due dates in output, and filters against the same due-state logic used by rendering.

The web UI now surfaces due-aware task badges in rendered notes and adds all/upcoming/overdue task views on `/tasks`, including filtering and task-view tabs in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go). I also updated docs in [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md) and added coverage for parsing, toggle preservation, CLI filtering, rendered badges, and web task views in [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go).

I could not run `gofmt` or `go test ./...` because this environment does not have `gofmt` or `go` installed on `PATH`.
